text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm explaining today's training plan to Air
Groove, but she seems off-kilter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Continue what you were saying.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If I say I'm fine, I'm fine—end of discussion.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. To tell you the truth, I've been
suffering from a migraine recently.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's put me in a foul mood. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems to be plagued by a severe
headache.
